goal: Make item search open faster and avoid looking broken while the large monster data is still loading.
changes: Added ensureItemDataLoaded() for ITEM.INI, MAGIC.INI, and STATUS.INI only.
Item search now loads item data without loading MONSTER_C.INI.
Reverse lookup still loads the full item + monster drop data because it needs DropItem.
Loading screens were changed back to Chinese.
verification: Local INI parse check passed for MONSTER_C.INI, ITEM.INI, MAGIC.INI, and STATUS.INI.
